evidence: "I love slashers and this was a well done slasher."

"There was plenty of gore and suspense."
"I usually don't give one star ratings for horror movies but this one had nothing to offer."

"It's very creepy and atmospheric with great action kills and suspense."

"This movie was great and I recommend it all to watch."

summary: The user is a dedicated horror and slasher film fan, showing a strong preference for fast-paced, suspenseful narratives. They appreciate strong performances from actors and are less concerned with production quality, focusing instead on the enjoyment and emotional impact of the films.
